prompt: A collage arts like the reference image of different moments of families meetings.
prompt_refined: Generate a multi-panel collage artwork depicting different moments of family meetings, structured similarly to image 1. A large, prominent image showcasing a significant family gathering scene should be centrally positioned. This central image should be surrounded by a dense, grid-like or mosaic arrangement of numerous smaller, diverse images. These peripheral panels should portray various candid family interactions, close-up details, or fragmented scenes from family life, emulating the varied and layered visual elements found around the main subject in image 1. The overall aesthetic should be that of a rich, multi-layered collage art piece.
objects: family gathering scene in central image
numerous smaller images surrounding the central image
candid family interactions in smaller images
close-up details from family life in smaller images
fragmented scenes from family life in smaller images
